title: tarenna precidantenna
side_effects: Tarenna precidantenna can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, dizziness, and vomiting in some individuals due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Long-term consumption of tarenna precidantenna can lead to liver damage, kidney problems, and even cardiovascular issues. In rare cases, improper use of the plant can also trigger allergic reactions, including skin rashes, itching, and difficulty breathing. Furthermore, pregnant women and children should avoid using tarenna precidantenna altogether due to its potential to harm fetal development and cause developmental delays.
